title: mistake hallucinated done evidence gate
purpose: G5.1 defines mistake hallucinated done evidence gate for the agent-driven expert system. Verification & quality — evidence, goal_verify, anti-mistake.
scope: Owns `G5.1` only; siblings under `G5` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §9 — Branch G — Verification & quality plane (anti-mistake)](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#9-branch-g-verification-quality-plane-anti-mistake).
behavior_steps: The **full prompt** from the queue (includes reader narrative and output rules)
After each verify-router run on a task card, S0 increments retry_count in state and compares it to the escalation threshold from the active pack.
On the first repeated failure for the same task, the conductor spawns a bounded rework turn with the prior evidence log paths in allowed_reads—no silent autopilot retry loop.

When retry_count crosses the S4 threshold, pursuit pauses at H2 with a structured escalation package: evidence paths, failure class, retry count, and suggested operator action per [B3.3](B3.3-escalation-loop-on-verify-fail.md).
edge_cases: Operator closes laptop mid-loop â€” state.json must resume from last good dual-write.
Concurrent manual edit to queue JSON â€” conductor reloads queue each wake; last writer wins with journal note.
Flaky test â€” escalation S4 once, then H2 with evidence log; no silent retry loop.
Edge case `G5.1` variant 4: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `G5.1`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.
failure_modes: **Silent stop:** Agent ends turn without updating queue â†’ mitigated by /loop + check-hierarchy-queue.py EMPTY gate.
**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.
implementation: Extend verify-router for goal-level suite invocation.
Wire CI: validate-workflow checks goal block when pursuit.mode=goal_autopilot.
Validate `G5.1` against SEC-15 release checklist and parent index links.
Document `G5.1` in parent index with verify command and release tag.
Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `G5.1`.

narrative: G5.1 defines mistake hallucinated done evidence gate for the agent-driven expert system. Verification & quality — evidence, goal_verify, anti-mistake. In practice, the system **a leaf id** (e.g. `g4.3`, `g5.2`, `f5.1`), or, then the **full prompt** from the queue (includes reader narrative and output rules).
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-g 2026-06-28 -->

Hallucinated done is declaring a task or goal complete without evidence files and passed verify—a common agent failure mode. Controls: `evidence_required`, mandatory verify-router runs, validate-workflow checks on `last_verify`, and conductor discipline never marking TODOS complete in prose alone.

Audit and hierarchy quality scripts re-enqueue deepen when queue items close without artifacts. This mistake class is the philosophical core of Plane G: success is demonstrated, not assumed.
